message:
Improve search v3 queries, deploy robustness, and CLI refinements

- search_v3.rs: expand search query handling with additional filtering
  and result refinement logic (+43 lines)
- deploy.rs: harden deployment flow with better error handling and
  retry logic for transient failures (+128/-49 lines)
- cli/lib.rs: minor CLI adjustments for consistency

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
